---
id: retrieves-timeline-data-for-a-date-range
title: "Retrieves timeline data for a date range"
description: "Returns day-by-day timeline data including visits, tracks, and photos for the authenticated user. Maximum date range is 31 days."
sidebar_label: "Retrieves timeline data for a date range"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves timeline data for a date range"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/timeline"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns day-by-day timeline data including visits, tracks, and photos for the authenticated user. Maximum date range is 31 days.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
